creator: freebsd@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
is there anybody working on integrating the openbsd wpi driver into freebsd?

right now i am using this experimental driver:
http://bsd-geek.de/FreeBSD/wpi-freebsd.tgz

which works pretty good.
it produces a lot of

rx tail flags error 702

messages and i have had a couple of freezes in the last month. but other
than that it works much better than the blob-driver on linux.

will this driver be imported to at least -current sometime soon?

thank you very much!
